description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times and inflicts Down for [2.5 sec->1.5 sec]. [God's Proxy] : Damage increases by [(added) 25%], attack range increases by [(added) 50%], and Down duration increases by [(added) 0.5 sec].

Dashes behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by [25%->30%] for [10 sec->4 sec]. [God's Proxy] : Damage increases by [(added) 25%], skill cast time is reduced by [(added) 1 sec], and Critical Rate is applied 500 higher.

Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [3 sec -> 2 sec]. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for [20 sec->10 sec], empowering skills. [God's Proxy] : ATK increases, Attack Speed by [250->30%], Physical Evasion by [250->300], Normal Attack DMG by [125%->150%], and Status Resistance by [immunity to CC->600]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Magic DEF increases, and Magic Evasion increases by [200->250]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 30%, and damage taken is reduced by 30%.

dark.unified: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.
On hit, reduces the target’s Physical DEF by [30%->35%] for 10 sec.

light.unified: Reduces Physical DMG taken by [20%->25%] during the duration.

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000], but damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 100% during the duration.

description.unified: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times and is irremovable.
[Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 250 and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and own DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.
On hit, has a 35% chance to deal additional Physical DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. This effect can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
